data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validated tests. 19/21 pass. 2 RED (test_design_areas_complete, test_design_notes_output) — correctly failing because SKILL.md doesn't yet have design areas or .claude/design-notes.md reference. 2 design tests pass already (test_design_questions_conditional, test_design_skip_non_ui) because SKILL.md already mentions UI and skip/CLI terms. All 17 prior tests still passing. Acceptance criteria: PASS.
